articles.title: Mumbai–Pune heatwave alert: With March already 'so hot', what does IMD’s warning predict for season ahead?
articles.description: Mumbai–Pune heatwave alert: Mumbai, Pune, Thane, and Palghar are experiencing an early heatwave with temperatures soaring to 38.9°C, significantly above seasonal averages. An anticyclone over Gujarat is pushing hot air towards coastal Maharashtra, leading to …
